dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Level thesis is explicitly no_trade — it sees the ribbon MIXED (14¢ spread) as directional ambiguity and wants to see 687.09 test outcome before committing; internals casts a bullish vote on risk-on sector rotation (XLK +0.95%, all three sectors positive) that directly contradicts a sustained bearish thesis.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: The bearish agents treat VIX elevation as a directional-down signal, but rising IV into tight consolidation with risk-on sector breadth (XLK +0.95%) signals volatility-expansion breakout with direction yet to be determined — not a confirmed downside continuation.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: VIX rolls over and drops below 21.0 by 10:00 ET while sectors remain bid — high-probability event that would flip the dominant bearish rationale and confirm the bullish-expansion read internals is already pricing.

primary.condition: if SPY tests 687.09 (prior session RTH high) and holds it as resistance on first touch

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks above 687.09 on volume > 2.5x 5-min average

invalidation.condition: VIX drops below 21.0 by 10:00 ET while XLK continues outperforming SPY
invalidation.effect: IV contraction + sector strength combination collapses the primary bearish thesis; pivot immediately to bullish breakout watch at 687.09 — the risk-on internals signal would be confirmed as structural, not residual.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY will test the 687.09 battle level (prior session RTH high, Active 2-star resistance) within the first 60 minutes of RTH (by 10:30 ET), given price is only 1.53 points below at the open
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not touch 687.09 at any point before 10:30 ET, instead trading below 685.00 support at the open

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX will remain elevated above 21.0 through 10:00 ET, sustaining the HIGH volatility regime and keeping put premium inflated relative to call premium
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX prints below 21.0 on any 5-minute bar before 10:00 ET

swarm_predictions.claim: The ribbon spread will widen to at least 20 cents in the bearish direction (fast EMA < slow EMA, spread >= 20c) by 10:30 ET, confirming the WEAK_BEAR verdict into a CLEAN_BEAR signal — price needs to close at least one 5-minute bar below 685.56 on volume above the 20-bar average
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Ribbon spread widens to 20c+ in the bullish direction (fast > slow >= 20c) OR SPY posts a 5-minute bar close above 686.50 (the pivot) on above-average volume before 10:30 ET

synthesis_narrative: SPY enters 2026-03-05 in a volatility-expansion squeeze: price (685.56) is compressed between Reference support at 685.0 (−0.56) and Active resistance at 687.09 (+1.53) with a MIXED ribbon only 14 cents wide that refuses directional confirmation. The swarm leans bearish on the strength of the prior session's late-day selling cascade (3 consecutive red bars, 62-cent cumulative drop on 163k volume) and VIX elevation at 22.47 HIGH regime, but the consensus carries low conviction (conf 44) because two of four specialists dissent — the level thesis explicitly waits for breakout direction and internals show clean risk-on rotation (XLK +0.95%) that structurally contradicts sustained weakness. The single most critical variable at open is whether 687.09 holds as resistance or yields on volume: a rejection with volume confirms the bearish case targeting 679.63; a breakout flips the entire thesis bullish targeting 693.17 with the highest-probability invalidation being VIX rolling below 21.0 by 10:00 ET while sectors remain bid.

technical.one_line: WEAK_BEAR ribbon (14c spread, below 20c clean threshold) + strong_bear bar structure (3 red bars, 62c cumulative drop, final bar 78% body on 163k volume) — bearish momentum confirmed by price below EMA pivot, limited by MIXED ribbon

macro.one_line: HIGH VIX regime (22.47, +6.09%) with zero macro events today favors bearish setups — but risk-on sector rotation (XLK +0.95%) creates a contradictory signal that limits conviction

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level 687.09 (Active resistance, +1.53 above price) sets the morning direction — MIXED ribbon vetoes any directional lean before breakout confirmation; await 687.09 test outcome

internals.one_line: Risk-on rotation confirmed: XLK +0.95% leading, XLF +0.33% supporting, XLE +0.23% neutral — all sectors positive with Tech outperforming SPY, narrow breadth but directionally bullish

validator.top_invalidation: VIX spike into tight consolidation (685.0–687.09 = 2.09-wide range) with risk-on sector backdrop signals volatility-expansion breakout pending — rising IV does not determine direction, and the +7.61 upside to 693.17 exceeds the −5.93 downside to 679.63, giving slight bullish asymmetry that bearish agents overlooked
